description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named publish that can be triggered manually with a tag name input. The workflow has separate jobs for building on android, ios, osx, and windows environments, each checking out the code and running a build script. Artifacts from each build job are uploaded. A final publish job, dependent on all build jobs, retrieves the plugin version from source, downloads the artifacts, creates a tarball, and then creates a release with the tarball as an asset using the provided tag name.
